channel.title: Welcome to UUMail on UUMail Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Welcome to UUMail on UUMail Blog

item.title: Email Alias: 7 Ways to Protect Your Real Inbox
item.description: An email alias is a separate address that forwards to your real inbox. Use one per signup to reduce spam, isolate leaks, and keep accounts recoverable.

item.title: Introducing UUMail: Email Aliases and Forwarding for Everyday Privacy
item.description: Introducing UUMail, an email alias and forwarding product for safer signups, cleaner identity boundaries, and practical inbox control.
